source: Seeded from the May 2026 post-mortem of a real bilingual deployment guide (POC 7.4 — Containment Switch). Each case is content that actually broke an earlier version of this skill in production use.

cases.title: Cover that triggers z-index clip when title is long

input_fixture.html:
POC 7.4 - Containment Switch

Reaccion ante Nuevas Amenazas

Guia tecnica de implementacion del interruptor de contencion portable.
input_fixture.notes: Spanish title (30+ chars) on a cover with three absolutely-positioned geo shapes. No explicit stacking context on either side.

cases.expected_detection: scripts/visual_verify.py check 4 reports Z_INDEX_INTERSECT: h1 'Reaccion ante Nuevas Amenazas' intersects .geo-1 with both effective z-index = 0.
cases.expected_fix: Apply Cover Stacking Rules from SKILL.md Document Architecture: wrap foreground in .cover-content with position:relative, z-index:2, max-width:560px; set .geo-* to z-index:1.
cases.pass_criteria: After fix, check 4 produces no findings; rendered cover shows full title above all decorations.

cases.title: Long SVG sequence-diagram caption near right edge of viewBox

input_fixture.html:
<svg viewBox="0 0 800 480" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <line x1="680" y1="420" x2="680" y2="445" stroke="#2E8B57" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="690" y="437" font-size="11" fill="#2E8B57" font-weight="700">9. firewall installed -> port blocked</text>
</svg>
input_fixture.notes: Single-line caption starts at x=690 inside an svg with right edge at 800. Caption length exceeds the remaining 110px horizontal space.

cases.expected_detection: scripts/visual_verify.py check 1 reports SVG_TEXT_OVERFLOW: text right edge ~65 px beyond svg right edge.
cases.expected_fix: Split into two centered lines: <text x="680" y="437" text-anchor="middle">9. firewall installed</text><text x="680" y="450" text-anchor="middle">port blocked</text>.
cases.pass_criteria: After fix, check 1 produces no findings; both caption lines render inside the svg's viewBox.

cases.title: SVG legend with 230-char single-line Spanish caption

input_fixture.html:
<svg viewBox="0 0 800 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <rect x="50" y="310" width="700" height="40" rx="6" fill="#F5F0EA" stroke="#EDE6DC"/>
  <text x="60" y="332" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="#2D2D2D">Lectura:</text>
  <text x="120" y="332" font-size="11" fill="#3D3D3D">EB bloquea tcp/3389 entre cualquier par de workloads gestionados; el RuleSet con regla allow re-habilita las conexiones legitimas hacia el VS, que esta vinculado a los workloads productores.</text>
</svg>
input_fixture.notes: Spanish runs ~15% longer than English equivalent. SVG <text> does not auto-wrap.

cases.expected_detection: scripts/visual_verify.py check 1 reports SVG_TEXT_OVERFLOW: caption right edge ~237 px beyond svg right edge.
cases.expected_fix: Split into two centered <text> rows AND increase the legend <rect> height from 40 to ~44 px to accommodate. Alternative: render the caption inside a <foreignObject> with an HTML <div> (which wraps).
cases.pass_criteria: After fix, check 1 produces no findings; full Spanish sentence visible inside the legend rectangle.

cases.title: SVG arrow with label coordinates on the line

input_fixture.html:
<svg viewBox="0 0 800 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <line x1="580" y1="130" x2="640" y2="100" stroke="#3B7DD8" stroke-width="1.8"/>
  <text x="615" y="105" font-size="10" fill="#3B7DD8">bound to</text>
</svg>
input_fixture.notes: Label coords (615,105) lie on the line between (580,130) and (640,100). Glyphs are bisected by the arrow stroke.

cases.expected_detection: Human visual review item 5 (diagram label collisions). No programmatic detection in current check set — candidate for a future label/line intersection heuristic.
cases.expected_fix: Reposition label to <text x="585" y="92">bound to</text>: ~8 px clearance above the line on the side opposite the arrow head.
cases.pass_criteria: Rendered arrow and label do not visibly intersect.

cases.title: Long document — sampling temptation

input_fixture.scenario: An 11-section document where visible defects exist in sections 0 (cover, z-index), 3 (sequence diagram, SVG overflow), and 4 (object-model diagram, SVG overflow + label collision). The remaining sections (1, 2, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10) are clean.
input_fixture.prompt: Verify the rendered document is clean before declaring it ready for customer review.

cases.expected_detection: scripts/visual_verify.py is run BEFORE human review and catches all SVG_TEXT_OVERFLOW and Z_INDEX_INTERSECT findings deterministically. Human review then walks every section — sections 0, 3, 4 are flagged and re-rendered; sections 1, 2, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10 are explicitly confirmed clean (not skipped).
cases.expected_fix: Workflow compliance — the agent must not declare 'a couple of representative sections look good, shipping.'
cases.pass_criteria: The agent reports per-section status for ALL 11 sections, not a subset. Sampling sections {1, 2, 5, 7, 9} would miss every defect — this is the explicit pass/fail criterion.
cases.anti_pattern: Sampling-style declarations like 'I checked sections 0, 1, 2, 5, 10 and they look clean — shipping.'

cases.title: Tone — comparison between two technologies in Spanish

input_fixture.prompt: In the Sentinel-reference section, explain when this script is preferable vs. the official Sentinel playbook. Spanish narrative.

cases.expected_output_pass_example: El script aplica cuando el cliente no ha desplegado Sentinel, cuando la ejecucion debe correr desde un bastion sin acceso a Azure, o cuando el SIEM es Splunk, QRadar o Wazuh. El playbook de Sentinel aplica cuando el cliente ya tiene Sentinel y Logic Apps operativos.
cases.anti_pattern_fail_example: El playbook de Sentinel es como una orquesta sinfonica completa con director, partitura impresa y sala de conciertos reservada. Nuestro script es la misma melodia tocada con guitarra acustica en cualquier lugar — menos espectaculo, misma musica, instalacion en 30 segundos.
cases.tripwire_note: Substring matching is a fast first filter. Add an LLM-judge step that flags any creative analogy (musical, sports, food, animal, theatrical, military) regardless of language.
cases.pass_criteria: Output is direct technical comparison; no tripwire substring matches; LLM-judge confirms no metaphor.

cases.title: Logo rendering in cover, section header, or footer

input_fixture.prompt: Generate a branded cover for an Illumio deployment guide.

cases.expected_output_pass: on cover; in section running headers.
anti_pattern_examples: .logo-mark::before { content: ""; background: var(--ill-orange); transform: rotate(45deg); border-radius: 3px; }
cases.pass_criteria: Logo references resolve to assets/logo-dark.png or assets/logo-white.png via with relative src. No CSS-shape decoration in lieu of the wordmark. No base64 data URIs.

cases.title: Render-artifact cleanup

input_fixture.scenario: After the verification loop completes, the deliverable folder contains a _render/ subdirectory with 38 PNG files: 11 first-pass section renders, 11 post-cover-fix renders, 8 post-SVG-fix renders, 2 full-page screenshots, 1 zoomed cover, 1 final confirmation render. Only 3 of those 38 captured actual bugs.

cases.expected_end_state: Deliverable folder contains a _findings/ subdirectory with ONLY the 3 PNGs that documented defects, each cross-referenced in a README.md to its bug and the applied fix. The _render/ directory is empty or deleted. Final HTML and PDF are present alongside _findings/.
cases.pass_criteria: Number of PNG files in the deliverable folder ≤ 5 (typically 0-3). README.md inside _findings/ exists and references each retained capture.
cases.anti_pattern: Shipping the deliverable with all 38 intermediate renders.
